name: FiBuKI Tax Studio
description: Manage bank transactions, receipts, and tax bookkeeping for Austrian/German small businesses. 25 tools for transactions, files, partners, and categories.

channel.blurb: AI-powered tax bookkeeping for Austrian & German freelancers and small businesses

apiKey.description: Your FiBuKI API key. Generate at fibuki.com > Settings > Integrations > AI Agents, or run: npx @fibukiapp/cli auth
